product.name: RevenueOps Copilot
product.description: An AI-powered assistant that helps sales teams generate ICPs, multi-channel outreach sequences, and MEDDPICC-based qualification summaries using company context and shared artifacts.
key_features: ICP builder tailored to product positioning
CRM note summarization for deal reviews

value_prop: Reduce manual prep time for sales collateral by 60%+
Standardize qualification with MEDDPICC to improve forecast accuracy
Increase pipeline generation via consistent multi-channel sequences
Enforce quality gates with cross-role reviews to prevent drift
differentiators: Built-in multi-agent orchestration with clear handoffs
Reviewer quality gates by default (no self-approval)
Supports both local and API-based AI models for privacy or capability needs

pain_indicators: Growing SDR team without standardized outreach
Interest in AI-assisted sales ops with governance
anti_signals: On-prem only with strict no-cloud policies (without local model allowance)
